headline: Trump 🍊 Extends Israel-Lebanon Truce 3 Weeks vs Hezbollah 💥🚀
text:
Trump 🍊👑 dropping TRUTH BOMBS 💣📱 on Truth Social 🐦💥: Israel 🇮🇱🛡️ & Lebanon 🇱🇧☪️ ceasefire EXTENDED 3 WEEKS ⏰📈 after envoys SLAYED talks in DC 🏛️🤝 – 'WENT VERY WELL' 😎👍, now US helping Lebanon YEET Hezbollah 🚫👹 like a bad ex! Fragile truce was EXPIRING Sunday 😱⏳ but Donnie made it THICC 🍑📜 for 7+ weeks of BOOM-BOOM 💥💨 between IDF 🪖🔥 and Iran-backed Hezbollah munchkins 🧔🚀.

Oval Office glow-up ✨🏠: Trump spilling TEA ☕ that Lebanese Prez Joseph Aoun 🇱🇧👨‍💼 & Bibi Netanyahu 🇮🇱🕶️ coming to White House PARTY 🥳🏛️ 'in coming weeks' – 'They got Hezbollah DRAMA 👻 to sort, we're STRAIGHTENING Lebanon like my hair 🪢😤 and syncing with Iran SHAKEUP 🌪️🇮🇷!' Ambassadors Nada Hamadeh Moawad 💃🇱🇧 & Yechiel Leiter 🧔🇮🇱 simping HARD 🤤 for Trump Daddy: 'UNITED to PURGE malign Hezbollah INFLUENCE 🧹😈 from Lebanon – no more rocket RAVES 🎆🚫!'

But TEA SPILLS ☕💦: Hezbollah YEETS rockets at north Israel 🌋📍 cuz IDF 'VIOLATION' 🙄🛡️ – IDF INTERCEPTS like AVENGERS 🦸‍♂️🛡️! Lebanon RAGES 😡 over Israeli airstrikes 💣☁️ killing journalist 😢📰 & wounding another – IDF: 'NOT US, FAKE NEWS 🚫📺!' Israel: 'No BEEF with Lebanon, let's TEAM-UP vs Hezbollah TERROR 🫂💥!'

Flashback DEETS 🕰️🔥: First HIGH-LEVEL DC meet in 30 YEARS 👴📈 last week – post-Nov 2024 truce, Israel DAILY YEETING Hezbollah LINKS 💥🕵️. US-Israel HIT Iran Feb 28 KILLING Supreme Leader 👑💀 – Hezbollah RETALIATES March 2 with rockets/DRONES 🛫🚀 into Israel! IDF BOMBS south Lebanon & Beirut 🏚️💣, troops OCCUPY 10km Lebanese turf 🪖🇱🇧 – 2,294 DEAD in Lebanon (274 women 👩😢, 177 kids 👶💔 per health ministry 📊😭), Hezbollah kills 2 Israeli civs 🕊️ & 15 IDF soldiers 🪖⚰️.

UN STATS 😱📉: 1MIL+ displaced in Lebanon (1/5 pop 🏃‍♂️💨), south VILLAGES FLATTENED 🏘️🔥 by Israel! Hezbollah Shia MILITIA/PARTY 🕌🛡️ – US/Israel/Lebanese DEMAND DISARM 🚫🔫 but they like 'NAH BRUH, we're your ONLY DADDY in weak state 💪😤!' Aoun: 'No FORCE DISARM, needs NEGO 🔥🤝 or VIOLENCE ERUPTS 🌋!'

Trump MAGA MAGIC 🪄🍊 fixing Middle East MESS like Epstein files DROP 💣📜 – Hezbollah on THIN ICE 🧊😬, Bibi & Aoun incoming for WH SUMMIT 🏔️🤝! No more rocket ORGIES 💥👯‍♂️, just PEACE THICCNESS 🍆✌️ – WALL STREET CUCKS 📉🐔 watching Donnie MOON 🌙🚀 the region! ‼️🔥💦
